info.title: A .NET Core global tool to list outdated Nuget packages.

options.name: --version
options.description: Show version information.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information.

options.name: --include-auto-references
options.description:
Specifies whether to include
auto-referenced packages.

options.name: --pre-release
options.description:
Specifies whether to look for
pre-release versions of packages.
Possible values: Auto (default),
Always or Never.
Allowed values are: Auto, Always,
Never.
Default value is: Auto.

options.name: --version-lock
options.description:
Specifies whether the package
should be locked to the current
Major or Minor version. Possible
values: None (default), Major or
Minor.
Allowed values are: None, Major,
Default value is: None.

options.name: --transitive
options.description:
Specifies whether it should detect
transitive dependencies.

options.name: --transitive-depth
options.description:
Defines how many levels deep
transitive dependencies should be
analyzed. Integer value (default =
1)
Default value is: 1.

options.name: --upgrade
options.description:
Specifies whether outdated packages
should be upgraded. Possible values
for <TYPE> is Auto (default) or
Prompt.
Allowed values are: Auto, Prompt.

options.name: --fail-on-updates
options.description:
Specifies whether it should return
a non-zero exit code when updates
are found.

options.name: --include
options.description:
Specifies to only look at packages
where the name contains the
provided string. Culture and case
insensitive. If provided multiple
times, a single match is enough to
include a package.

options.name: --exclude
options.description:
Specifies to only look at packages
where the name does not contain the
exclude a package.

options.name: --output
options.description:
Specifies the filename for a
generated report. (Use the
-of|--output-format option to
specify the format. JSON by
default.)

options.name: --output-format
options.description:
Specifies the output format for the
generated report. Possible values:
json (default) or csv.
Allowed values are: Json, Csv.
Default value is: Json.

options.name: --older-than
options.description:
Only include package versions that
are older than the specified number
of days.
Default value is: 0.

options.name: --no-restore
options.description:
Add the reference without
performing restore preview and
compatibility check.

options.name: --recursive
options.description:
Recursively search for all projects
within the provided directory.

options.name: --ignore-failed-sources
options.description:
Treat package source failures as
warnings.

options.name: --createpr
options.description:
Specifies whether a PR shpuld be
created. Possible values for <TYPE>
is Auto (default) or Prompt.

options.name: --username
options.description:
Username (used for logging in and
commit message)

options.name: --commitEmail
options.description: Email used in commit message

options.name: --githubtoken
options.description:
Github Token (if github used). Also
available via "GITHUB_TOKEN"
environment variable

options.name: --failonupdates
options.description: Specifies whether it should return a non-zero exit code when updates are found.

options.name: --filterexclude
options.description: Specifies to only look at packages where the name does not contain the provided string. Culture and case insensitive. If provided multiple times, a single match is enough to exclude a package.

options.name: --filterinclude
options.description: Specifies to only look at packages where the name contains the provided string. Culture and case insensitive. If provided multiple times, a single match is enough to include a package.

options.name: --ignorefailedsources
options.description: Treat package source failures as warnings.

options.name: --includeautoreferences
options.description: Specifies whether to include auto-referenced packages.

options.name: --norestore
options.description: Add the reference without performing restore preview and compatibility check.

options.name: --olderthandays
options.description: Only include package versions that are older than the specified number of days.

options.name: --outputfileformat
options.description: Specifies the output format for the generated report. Possible values: json (default) or csv.

options.name: --outputfilename
options.description: Specifies the filename for a generated report. (Use the -of|--output-format option to specify the format. JSON by default.)

options.name: --prerelease
options.description: Specifies whether to look for pre-release versions of packages. Possible values: Auto (default), Always or Never.

options.name: --transitivedepth
options.description: Defines how many levels deep transitive dependencies should be analyzed. Integer value (default = 1)

options.name: --versionlock
options.description: Specifies whether the package should be locked to the current Major or Minor version. Possible values: None (default), Major or Minor.
